item-01.message: Link text "see more" is generic and does not convey its destination out of context.
item-01.justification: Visible link name is the enumerated generic phrase "see more"; no wrapper or aria-label supplies a descriptive name.

item-02.message: Link text "learn more" is generic and uninformative out of context.
item-02.justification: Visible link name is the enumerated generic phrase "learn more"; not suppressed, not already caught.

item-05.message: Link name is a raw URL rather than human-readable text.
item-05.justification: The link's visible text content is a raw URL read out character-by-character by screen readers; noisy name failure.

item-06.justification: Visible link text is a raw file path plus query/token string; noisy name failure.
